nodes.label: .`loadPlaylist populates playlist and tracks on success`()
.`loadPlaylist automatically loads all remaining pages in the background`()
.`loadPlaylist stops auto-loading after a page fails instead of retrying forever`()
.`loadNextPage appends tracks and clears hasMoreTracks on the last page`()
.`loadNextPage does nothing when hasMoreTracks is false`()
.`deleteTrack removes track from state and calls backend`()
.`deleteTrack restores track and sets error when backend call fails`()
.`toggleTrackLike adds track to likedTrackIds on success`()
.`toggleTrackLike removes track from likedTrackIds when already liked`()
.`toggleTrackLike sets error and leaves state unchanged on failure`()
